Build: Use Embroider Build Pipeline
Build: Enable Tree Shaking
skills.body:
Use named exports and configure Embroider for optimal tree shaking.

âťŚ Default exports (bad for tree shaking):
```javascript
export default class MyComponent extends Component {}
```

âś… Named exports (good for tree shaking):
```javascript
export class MyComponent extends Component {}
```

Exception: Route templates are the ONLY place where default exports are used in modern Ember.

Named exports enable bundlers to remove unused code, reducing bundle size by 10-30%.

Component: Use Composition Patterns
skills.body:
Prefer component composition with yield blocks over complex prop drilling. ```gjs // Card component with named blocks // Usage: <:header>My Title

Card content goes here

<:footer> ``` Composition is more flexible and maintainable than passing many props.

skills.title: Component: File Naming Conventions
Component: Use {{on}} Modifier for Events
skills.body:
Use the {{on}} modifier for event handling instead of action helpers or inline handlers.

âťŚ Old patterns:
```handlebars
<button {{action 'handleClick'}}>Click</button>
<button onclick={{action 'handleClick'}}>Click</button>
```

âś… Modern pattern:
```gjs
import { on } from '@ember/modifier';

<template>
  <button {{on 'click' this.handleClick}}>Click</button>
</template>
```

The {{on}} modifier provides better performance and clearer semantics.

skills.title: Accessibility: Use Automated Testing
Accessibility: Associate Labels with Inputs
skills.body: Always associate labels with form inputs and announce errors to screen readers. ```gjs ``` Use role="alert" to announce errors to screen readers when they appear.

VSCode: Recommended Extensions
skills.body:
Set up recommended VSCode extensions for optimal Ember development.

Create `.vscode/extensions.json`:
```json
{
  "recommendations": [
    "emberjs.vscode-ember",
    "vunguyentuan.vscode-glint",
    "esbenp.prettier-vscode",
    "dbaeumer.vscode-eslint"
  ]
}
```

- `emberjs.vscode-ember` - Ember.js language support, syntax highlighting for .hbs/.gjs/.gts
- `vunguyentuan.vscode-glint` - TypeScript support for Ember templates
- `esbenp.prettier-vscode` - Code formatting
- `dbaeumer.vscode-eslint` - ESLint integration
